event: Mesh routing policy version 2026.03.07.2 completed rollout
Inventory maintenance reduced spare local endpoints in us-east-1b
Checkout latency and 504 alerts fired across the purchase path
Payment provider was suspected first because failures surfaced at the final checkout step
Payment probes stayed healthy while cross-zone routing and mesh retries climbed sharply
Inventory backpressure and duplicated reservation attempts were identified as secondary effects of mesh retry behavior
Team isolated the routing-policy rollout interacting with reduced local inventory capacity and approved rollback
Rollback to mesh routing policy version 2026.03.07.1 completed
Checkout success and service latencies recovered as retry rate and cross-zone routing fell
